opportunityID.title: OpportunityId
opportunityID.description: The Opportunity record ID needed to create a new business quote.

priceBookName.title: PriceBookName
priceBookName.description: The name of the pricebook. If left blank, it will default to the standard pricebook, so this is an optional input.

quoteName.title: QuoteName
quoteName.description: The quote's name. It can be ignored if the user hasn't specified a quote name explicitly.
